projectDescription: A REST API built with Node.js and Express for managing income and expenses, organizing transactions, and generating financial statistics including balance, monthly summaries, and top spending categories.
keyFeatures: Full CRUD operations for financial transactions (income and expenses)
Advanced filtering by type, category, month, and year
Financial balance calculation with optional period filtering
Category-based expense breakdown with percentage distribution
Monthly summary with month-over-month comparison and percentage change
Top 5 spending categories ranked by total amount
Predefined categories: food, transport, entertainment, utilities, health, shopping, salary, other
Input validation using Zod schema validation
Layered architecture with controllers, models, routes, middleware, and schemas
publicApiSurface: GET /api/transactions - List all transactions with optional filters
GET /api/transactions/:id - Get a transaction by ID
GET /api/transactions/years - Get all years with transactions
GET /api/stats/by-category - Get expense breakdown by category
GET /api/stats/monthly - Get monthly summary with comparison
GET /api/categories/:id - Get a category by ID
